items.title: WAV Model Introduced for Implicit Long-Horizon Planning
items.title_cn: WAV 模型发布：用于隐式长时程规划
items.summary: The World-Value-Action (WAV) model is published on arXiv, proposing a unified world-model framework for vision-language-action systems with implicit planning.
items.summary_cn: World-Value-Action（WAV）模型在 arXiv 发布，提出了一个面向视觉-语言-动作系统的统一世界模型框架，并支持隐式规划。

items.title: HY-World 2.0 Released with Open-Source World Modeling Stack
items.title_cn: HY-World 2.0 发布，提供开源世界建模栈
items.summary: HY-World 2.0 is published on arXiv with project page and code release, covering multi-modal 3D world reconstruction, generation, and simulation.
items.summary_cn: HY-World 2.0 在 arXiv 发布，并附带项目页与代码开源，覆盖多模态 3D 世界重建、生成与模拟。

items.title: G-RSSM Proposes Graph-Structured World Models for Network Dynamics
items.title_cn: G-RSSM 提出面向网络动力学的图结构世界模型
items.summary: G-RSSM introduces a graph-structured recurrent state-space world model trained from offline trajectories for imagined-rollout policy learning.
items.summary_cn: G-RSSM 提出图结构循环状态空间世界模型，可基于离线轨迹进行训练并支持想象 rollout 的策略学习。

items.title: NVIDIA Launches Cosmos World Foundation Model Platform
items.title_cn: NVIDIA发布Cosmos世界基础模型平台
items.summary: NVIDIA launches Cosmos, a world foundation model platform with 14B parameters designed for physical AI applications including robotics and autonomous driving. Available open-source.
items.summary_cn: NVIDIA发布Cosmos，一个140亿参数的世界基础模型平台，用于物理AI应用，包括机器人和自动驾驶。以开源形式提供。

items.title: OpenAI Unveils Sora Turbo for ChatGPT Plus Users
items.summary: OpenAI expands Sora access to Plus and Pro subscribers with a faster 'Turbo' version capable of generating videos up to 20 seconds.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI将Sora访问权限扩展到Plus和Pro订阅者，推出更快的'Turbo'版本，可生成长达20秒的视频。

items.title: DreamerV3 Published in Nature
items.summary: The DreamerV3 algorithm is published in Nature, demonstrating mastery of diverse domains through world models without domain-specific tuning.
items.summary_cn: DreamerV3算法在Nature发表，展示了通过世界模型无需领域特定调优即可掌握多种领域。

items.title: Meta AI Releases V-JEPA for Video Understanding
items.title_cn: Meta AI发布V-JEPA用于视频理解
items.summary: Meta AI releases V-JEPA, a video joint embedding predictive architecture that learns video representations through feature prediction without pixel reconstruction.
items.summary_cn: Meta AI发布V-JEPA，一种视频联合嵌入预测架构，通过特征预测学习视频表示，无需像素重建。

items.title: Wayve Introduces PRISM-1 World Model for Autonomous Driving
items.title_cn: Wayve推出PRISM-1自动驾驶世界模型
items.summary: Wayve introduces PRISM-1, a next-generation world model for autonomous driving with improved simulation fidelity and scenario diversity.
items.summary_cn: Wayve推出PRISM-1，一个下一代自动驾驶世界模型，具有改进的模拟保真度和场景多样性。

items.title: Pika Labs Releases Pika 1.5 with Advanced Motion Features
items.title_cn: Pika Labs发布Pika 1.5，具备高级运动功能
items.summary: Pika 1.5 introduces advanced motion understanding, Pikaffects for video editing, and improved video generation quality.
items.summary_cn: Pika 1.5引入高级运动理解、用于视频编辑的Pikaffects和改进的视频生成质量。

items.title: Alibaba DAMO Releases Qwen2-VL Multimodal Model
items.title_cn: 阿里巴巴达摩院发布Qwen2-VL多模态模型
items.summary: Alibaba DAMO releases Qwen2-VL, a vision-language model with strong video understanding and world model capabilities for Chinese and English.
items.summary_cn: 阿里巴巴达摩院发布Qwen2-VL，一个具有强视频理解和世界模型能力的中英文视觉语言模型。

items.title: Runway Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Released
items.summary: Runway releases a faster 'Turbo' variant of Gen-3 Alpha with near real-time video generation capabilities.
items.summary_cn: Runway发布更快的Gen-3 Alpha 'Turbo'变体，具备接近实时的视频生成能力。

items.title: Meta AI Open-Sources SAM 2 for Video Segmentation
items.title_cn: Meta AI开源SAM 2用于视频分割
items.summary: Meta AI releases SAM 2 as open source, extending promptable segmentation to video with state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary_cn: Meta AI以开源形式发布SAM 2，将可提示分割扩展到视频，具有最先进的性能。

items.title: Stability AI Releases Stable Diffusion 3
items.summary: Stability AI releases Stable Diffusion 3 with improved text rendering, image quality, and multimodal understanding.
items.summary_cn: Stability AI发布Stable Diffusion 3，改进了文本渲染、图像质量和多模态理解。

items.title: Google DeepMind Advances Video Understanding with Gemini 1.5 Pro
items.title_cn: Google DeepMind通过Gemini 1.5 Pro推进视频理解
items.summary: Google DeepMind extends Gemini 1.5 Pro context window to 2M tokens, enabling unprecedented video understanding and world model analysis capabilities.
items.summary_cn: Google DeepMind将Gemini 1.5 Pro上下文窗口扩展到200万token，实现了前所未有的视频理解和世界模型分析能力。

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude 3 with Vision Capabilities
items.summary: Anthropic launches Claude 3 family with multimodal capabilities including vision understanding and long-context world model reasoning.
items.summary_cn: Anthropic推出Claude 3家族，具有多模态能力，包括视觉理解和长上下文世界模型推理。
